name: Session Creation UI
summary: Frontend page for creating a new AI agent session with model selection and configuration
goals: Provide a clean interface for starting new agent sessions
Allow initial model and configuration selection

specDetail.description: A dedicated page (NewSessionPage) that provides the UI for creating a new agent session. Includes fields for session name, model selection, and optional system prompt customization.

parameters.name: sessionName
parameters.description: Optional name for the new session (auto-generated if empty)

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: Selected AI model for the session

parameters.name: systemPrompt
parameters.description: Optional custom system prompt for the session

constraints: Must show available models with their capabilities and costs
Must validate that the project exists before allowing session creation
Must provide sensible defaults for all optional fields

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user clicks 'New Session' and fills in the form
acceptanceCriteria.then: a new agent session is created and the user is navigated to the session view

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
